creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200774
py-graphviz-0.10.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates graphics/py-graphviz to 0.10.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/xflr6/graphviz/blob/0.10.1/CHANGES.txt

Changes to the port:
- sorted NO_ARCH according to the PHB and to pet portlint


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-, 12.0-RELEASE, 13.0-CURRENT@r341993 amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK

Results from make test (all platforms, py27 + py36):

> 2 failed, 89 passed

The results are the same as the current version (= 0.8.4) in the ports tree.
